description.value: Aura faint conjuration and transmutation; CL 4th; Slot chest; Price 5,200 gp; Weight â DESCRIPTION This simple silk vest looks nondescript, but is actually studded with numerous secret pockets sewn into its lining. Hidden inside these are magic lockpicks that provide a +4 competence bonus on Disable Device checks. The vest also grants its wearer a +6 competence bonus on Escape Artist checks. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, knock, grease; Cost 2,600 gp.
